title: Finout Virtual Tag
description: A virtual tag configuration used for resource allocation and filtering in Finout, enabling cost attribution to teams, services, environments, and customers even when native tagging is incomplete.

id.description: The unique identifier of the virtual tag.

accountId.description: The unique identifier of the account associated with the virtual tag.

name.description: The name of the virtual tag.

rules.description: An array of rule objects that define the filtering criteria for the virtual tag.

name.description: The name or value assigned when the rule matches.

FilterObject.description: A filter object used to narrow query results, supporting logical AND/OR grouping and various operators.

costCenter.description: The cost center to filter on (e.g., AWS, GCP, Azure).

key.description: The MegaBill key to filter by.

displayName.description: The display name for the filter field.

value.description: The value or values to match against.

and.description: Logical AND grouping of filter conditions.

or.description: Logical OR grouping of filter conditions.
